items.title_en: Tulsi Gabbard resigning as Trump's intelligence chief
items.title_zh: 图尔西·加巴德辞去特朗普情报主管职务
items.desc_en: Gabbard is leaving her post to support her husband, who is battling a rare form of bone cancer, a White House official told MS NOW.
items.desc_zh: 一位白宫官员告诉《MS NOW》，加巴德将辞去职务以支持她的丈夫，她的丈夫正在与一种罕见的骨癌作斗争。

items.title_en: Wall Street thinks IMAX is ripe for a sale. Here's who could buy it
items.title_zh: 华尔街认为出售 IMAX 的时机已经成熟。谁可以购买
items.desc_en: A source told CNBC that IMAX has held "preliminary talks" through intermediaries, but no official pitches have been made by the company.
items.desc_zh: 一位消息人士告诉 CNBC，IMAX 已通过中间人进行了“初步谈判”，但该公司尚未做出任何正式宣传。

items.title_en: Kevin Warsh's real Fed 'regime change' may happen deep inside Wall Street's plumbing
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什真正的美联储“政权更迭”可能发生在华尔街的管道深处
items.desc_en: Warsh could guide to a smaller role in day-to-day markets, while also setting clearer rules for how and when it should intervene.
items.desc_zh: 沃什可以引导其在日常市场中发挥较小的作用，同时就如何以及何时进行干预制定更明确的规则。

items.title_en: Here's the case for 9,000 on the S&P 500 by the middle of next year, according to JPMorgan
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，到明年年中，标准普尔 500 指数将出现 9,000 点的情况
items.desc_en: Higher productivity could be even more supportive of the stock market than previously thought.
items.desc_zh: 更高的生产率可能比之前想象的更能支持股市。

items.title_en: Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争加剧通胀担忧，五月消费者信心创历史新低
items.desc_en: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.
items.desc_zh: 由于美伊战争和油价上涨，人们对价格上涨的担忧加剧，5 月份消费者信心跌至历史新低。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Dell Technologies, HP, Estee Lauder, Generac & more
items.title_zh: 中午涨幅最大的股票：戴尔科技、惠普、雅诗兰黛、Generac 等
items.desc_en: These are the companies making headlines in midday trading.
items.desc_zh: 这些公司在午盘交易中成为头条新闻。

items.title_en: Egg prices are plunging due to oversupply — and producers say margins are taking a hit as costs rise
items.title_zh: 由于供应过剩，鸡蛋价格暴跌，生产商表示，随着成本上升，利润率受到打击
items.desc_en: Egg prices are plunging from oversupply after avian flu shortages, but producers say persistent feed, fuel and labor costs are squeezing margins.
items.desc_zh: 禽流感短缺后，鸡蛋价格因供应过剩而暴跌，但生产商表示，持续的饲料、燃料和劳动力成本正在挤压利润。

items.title_en: Dow jumps 400 points to record as Wall Street heads for winning week, Treasury yields ease: Live updates

items.desc_zh: 本周股票和债券市场的波动性加剧。

items.desc_zh: 在量子公司的新股份公布后，预测市场平台 Kalshi 的交易员认为 IonQ、Micron 和 Anduril 可能是下一个。

items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，他会“记住”未申请关税退款的公司。无论如何，他们中的许多人
items.desc_en: Walmart confirmed to CNBC it has sought a tariff refund and plans to use any money it receives back to invest in lower prices for shoppers.

items.title_en: Elon Musk's SpaceX postpones Starship launch

items.desc_en: It comes just a day after the firm revealed plans for a record-breaking stock market debut.
items.desc_zh: 就在一天前，该公司公布了破纪录的股票上市计划。

items.title_en: Alberta to hold referendum on whether to remain in Canada
items.title_zh: 艾伯塔省将就是否留在加拿大举行公投
items.desc_en: Voters in the western province will decide next October whether they want to stay in Canada or move ahead with a process for a binding independence referendum.
items.desc_zh: 西部省份的选民将于明年十月决定是否留在加拿大或继续进行具有约束力的独立公投。

items.title_en: 'No means no': Greenlanders protest against Trump outside new US consulate
items.title_zh: “不就是不”：格陵兰人在美国新领事馆外抗议特朗普
items.desc_en: The inauguration of the new consulate comes amid a push by the US president for greater control over the island.
items.desc_zh: 新领事馆的落成是在美国总统推动对该岛加强控制之际举行的。

items.title_en: US to send 5,000 more troops to Poland, Trump says
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国将向波兰增派5000名士兵
items.desc_en: The announcement comes a week after the Pentagon cancelled a planned deployment of 4,000 troops to the country.
items.desc_zh: 一周前，五角大楼取消了向该国部署 4000 名士兵的计划。

items.title_zh: Shroomie

items.title_zh: 爱如实：约会初创公司承诺减少作弊行为

items.desc_zh: 对虚假约会资料的失望催生了采用不同方法的新约会服务。

items.title_en: UK police bosses urge unsafe platforms to be blocked for under-16s
items.title_zh: 英国警察局长敦促封锁 16 岁以下青少年的不安全平台
items.desc_en: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.
items.desc_zh: NCA 和 NPCC 表示，应该阻止儿童访问不能阻止他们看到裸体或与陌生人联系的网站。

items.title_en: Rubio says Cuba is threat to US as Havana accuses him of 'lies'
items.title_zh: 卢比奥称古巴对美国构成威胁，哈瓦那指责他“撒谎”
items.desc_en: Cuba's foreign minister accused Rubio of trying to "instigate a military aggression".
items.desc_zh: 古巴外交部长指责卢比奥试图“煽动军事侵略”。

items.desc_zh: 该审判已被定为其他 1200 个做出类似主张的学区的测试案例。

items.desc_zh: 一名疑似埃博拉受害者的悲痛亲友被阻止将他的尸体埋葬。

items.title_en: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom

items.desc_zh: YouTube 表示，它与专家合作提供适当的体验。 TikTok 表示，对于 Ofcom 没有承认其安全功能感到失望。

items.desc_zh: 马斯克的火箭制造商和卫星互联网提供商将以股票代码 SPCX 进行交易

items.title_zh: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
items.desc_en: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。

items.title_en: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
items.title_zh: 谷歌将推出自谷歌眼镜失败以来首款智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.
items.desc_zh: 这款眼镜将于秋季某个时候上市销售，让谷歌的人工智能产品能够与用户互动。

items.desc_zh: 加利福尼亚州奥克兰的试验揭开了人工智能领域的面纱，以及该领域核心人物的巨大自负。
